privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a synthetic product concept test survey in LimeSurvey. The survey is for evaluating a fictional sparkling water product line and contains exactly 2 question groups ('Product Appeal' and 'Purchase Likelihood') with 2 array questions. The survey uses 2 custom label sets: a 7-point satisfaction scale (Very Dissatisfied to Very Satisfied) and a 5-point purchase intent scale (Definitely Would Not Buy to Definitely Would Buy). The survey title must be 'Q4 2024 Product Concept Test - Sparkling Water Line' and must be anonymized and activated. All metadata claims align with the task specification.
